message:
fix(core,render,tty): fix 7 test failures across workspace

- terminal_session: add capability override in set_mouse_capture tests
  so mouse_sgr=true in test environment (3 tests fixed)
- buffer/frame: update should_panic tests to match new clamping behavior
  where Buffer::new clamps zero dimensions to 1 (4 tests fixed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
